Text:
GBS airway emergency: the obvious RSI paralytic is the wrong one. Comment your answer before the reveal.

Denervation and immobility upregulate extrajunctional acetylcholine receptors, so succinylcholine can dump potassium and stop the heart. Layer on the autonomic instability (wild swings in heart rate and blood pressure) and this is a high-stakes induction. Rocuronium 1.2 mg/kg buys RSI-speed onset without the depolarizing risk.
